title: My Family in Hindi
description: Read a family passage and answer questions.

blocks.passage:
📖 My Family in Hindi

यह मेरा परिवार है। (Yah mera parivār hai.) My mother helps me study. My father reads the newspaper. My brother plays in the evening, and my sister sings songs. I learn to say respectful words in Hindi when I talk about elders. I say, यह मेरी माँ हैं और यह मेरे पिता हैं। I also learn that family words are often used with warmth and respect.

As I practice, I can describe my family members and speak about them in simple Hindi sentences.

questions.q: What family word appears in the passage?
questions.a: माँ, पिता, भाई, बहन, or परिवार.

questions.q: Why are respectful words important here?
questions.a: Because Hindi often uses respectful forms for elders.

items.statement: The learner practices one word at a time.
items.explanation: The passage describes slow, step-by-step learning.

items.statement: Hindi is only used in formal books.
items.explanation: Hindi is used in daily conversation too.

items.statement: The learner learns useful everyday language.
items.explanation: The passage focuses on practical words and sentences.

blocks.title: Cultural Note
blocks.content: Respect and warmth are important in Hindi family talk. People often use polite forms when speaking about elders.
